title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login/register screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'LOG IN' button | Enter a valid email in the email field | Enter a valid password in the password field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login/register screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'LOG IN' button | Enter an invalid email in the email field | Enter a valid password in the password field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

title: Login with empty fields
preconditions: The app is launched and the login/register screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'LOG IN' button | Enter an empty email in the email field | Enter an empty password in the password field | Click on the 'LOG IN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are empty

preconditions: The app is launched and the login/register screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'REGISTER' button | Enter a valid email in the email field | Enter a valid password in the password field | Click on the 'REGISTER' button

title: Register with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login/register screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the 'REGISTER' button | Enter an invalid email in the email field | Enter a valid password in the password field | Click on the 'REGISTER' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials
